source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for Product Managers responsible for creating amazing games and building the best experience for our users in collaboration with a talented team. At Bigger, we are focused on player motivation and engagement, and our Product team is the key player that will help us fulfil this mission.

If you are a passionate product manager who loves games and shares our passion for enjoying and crafting games, come and join us!

ABOUT THIS ROLE:

 - Take full responsibility of the games from design to their main metrics 

 - Develop a strategic roadmap for improving the experience for millions of players

 - Analyze user data to improve the user experience and monitor main metrics

 - Iterate with A/B tests and come up with data-driven product decisions

 - Work closely with all functions to make the products that people love

 - Work on every aspect of your product such as brainstorming a new feature, releasing a new update or improving an animation in the game

 - Closely follow mobile game trends and gather market intelligence

 - Optimize and track monetization channels to improve LTV

YOU COULD BE A GREAT FIT IF:

 - Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Mathematics, Economics or relevant fields

 - 5+ years of relevant business experience

 - A good sense of gameplay experience and special attention to detail

 - Good analytical skills to make data-driven decisions 

 - Passionate about the startup environment

 - Being a collaborative team player

 - Experience with Excel and SQL is a big plus

BONUS POINT IF:

 - You’ve played Tasty Match: Cook and Puzzle and explored the game. If not, now’s a great time to start!

 - You’re curious about the gaming industry and eager to learn more.

 - You enjoy working in fast-moving, dynamic environments.

BENEFITS:

 - Be part of a top-tier team, learn from the best, and create games players love.

 - Competitive compensation. 

 - Health insurance with unlimited coverage. 

 - A beautiful, centrally located office in the heart of Istanbul.

 - Opportunities to attend global conferences and stay connected with the industry

 - Relocation support to make your move hassle-free if needed.



Follow Bigger Games on Linkedin http://www.linkedin.com/company/biggergames

source_jobs.title: Motion Graphics Designer | Marketing
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a passionate and creative Motion Designers for Marketing Team who will be producing engaging marketing creatives for our chart-topping games. You will be responsible for creating high quality marketing visuals for Bigger’s mobile marketing campaigns. As a part of our Marketing team, you will be working closely with marketing managers to reach and engage  with millions of players all around the world. 

If you are a talented marketing artist who loves games and shares our passion for games, come and join us!

ABOUT THIS ROLE:

 - Produce animated motion graphics and video layouts using After Effects

 - Collaborate with marketing teams to optimize creatives based on performance data

 - Stay updated on gaming, advertising, and visual design trends to keep our campaigns fresh and effective

 - Participate in brainstorming sessions to generate innovative concepts that drive user acquisition

YOU COULD BE A GREAT FIT IF:

 - 2+ years of experience in visual arts and creating motion graphics

 - Strong knowledge of visual editing tools, like Adobe Photoshop, After Effects, and Illustrator to be able to deliver quality assets

 - Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Arts or relevant fields is a plus

 - Solid understanding of color theory, composition, typography, and digital marketing visuals

 - Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset

 - Passion for games and player psychology

 - Great understanding of composition, color theory, and graphic/visual/stylistic trends in games

 - Good sense of gameplay experience and special attention to detail

 - A perfect team player with excellent communication skills

 - Good knowledge of 3D is a plus

 - Previous experience in a gaming company is a big plus

BONUS POINT IF:

 - You’ve played Tasty Match: Cook and Puzzle and explored the game. If not, now’s a great time to start!

 - You’re curious about the gaming industry and eager to learn more.

 - You enjoy working in fast-moving, dynamic environments.

BENEFITS:

 - Be part of a top-tier team, learn from the best, and create games players love.

 - Competitive compensation. 

 - Health insurance with unlimited coverage. 

 - A beautiful, centrally located office in the heart of Istanbul.

 - Opportunities to attend global conferences and stay connected with the industry

 - Relocation support to make your move hassle-free if needed.



Follow Bigger Games on Linkedin http://www.linkedin.com/company/biggergames

source_jobs.title: Game Developer
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for Game Developers who will grow with the challenges of chart-topping games. At Bigger, Game Developer are not only software programmers, but they are also designers. Together with the Product Team, you will architect gaming experiences that will reach millions of players. While creating best-in-class feelings for our users, you’ll be solving thousands of engineering problems along the way.
If you are a passionate Game Developer who loves games and shares our passion for enjoying and crafting games, come and join us!

ABOUT THIS ROLE:

 - Build high-quality games to create amazing experience for millions of players

 - Involve and contribute to all aspects of game development including Game Design, Logic, Feelings, Graphics and UIDesign, implement, improve and maintain various games with deep attention and care

 - Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Game Artists, and Marketing teams to deliver the best experience

 - Contribute new ideas for game design, features, and projects

 - Own your game together with the Product Team with lots of responsibility on an individual level

YOU COULD BE A GREAT FIT IF:

 - Bachelor’s Degree in a related field

 - Game development experience in Unity3D and the knowledge of workings of the engine

 - Strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals

 - Understanding various programming languages and build tools (C#, Gradle, Git, etc.)

 - Knowledge of software architecture design, OOP, and best practices about game development

 - Good sense of gameplay experience and special attention to detail

 - 5+ years of industry experience is a plus
   
   

BONUS POINT IF:

 - You’ve played Tasty Match: Cook and Puzzle and explored the game. If not, now’s a great time to start!

 - You’re curious about the gaming industry and eager to learn more.

 - You enjoy working in fast-moving, dynamic environments.

BENEFITS:

 - Be part of a top-tier team, learn from the best, and create games players love.

 - Competitive compensation. 

 - Health insurance with unlimited coverage. 

 - A beautiful, centrally located office in the heart of Istanbul.

 - Opportunities to attend global conferences and stay connected with the industry

 - Relocation support to make your move hassle-free if needed.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for Software Engineers who will grow with the challenges of chart-topping games.
Working closely with the Game Development Team, you will architect and maintain the large-scale backend architecture of mobile games that reach millions of players. While creating best-in-class feelings for our users, you’ll solve thousands of engineering problems along the way.

ABOUT THIS ROLE:

 - Create and maintain scalable, low-latency backend services to support game and platform functionality

 - Analyze and improve the efficiency, scalability and stability of the system

 - Secure and improve game performance, reliability and security issues

 - Involve and contribute to all aspects of game development

 - Collaborate closely with Studio Team; product managers, game developers, and artists to deliver the best experience to the users

YOU COULD BE A GREAT FIT IF:

 - Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science+2 years of experience as a software engineer

 - Java Spring Boot-based backend systems, deep understanding of Java and related technologies

 - Familiar with Java, Spring, Redis and AWS Cloud SystemsStrong engineering skills and programming fundamentals

 - Knowledge of software architecture design, OOP, and design patterns

 - Passion for mobile games, expecting to play games and paying special attention to detail and code quality

source_jobs.title: Data Scientist
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Data Scientist who thrives on solving complex problems and uncovering insights that drive top-performing games. In this role, you'll collaborate closely with the Marketing, Development, and Product teams to analyze player behaviour, optimize game performance, and turn data into actionable strategies. Your expertise in statistical analysis, machine learning, and data visualization will play a key role in shaping our games and enhancing player experiences.

ABOUT THIS ROLE:

 - Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field from a recognized university.

 - 2+ years of experience in data science, preferably in gaming or tech.

 - Expertise in statistical analysis, machine learning, and data visualization.

 - Proficiency in Python

 - Strong analytical mindset with a sharp eye for detail and problem-solving.

 - Excellent communication skills, capable of translating complex data into actionable insights for non-technical teams.

 - Passion for gaming, with a deep understanding of player behaviour and game mechanics.

YOU COULD BE A GREAT FIT IF:

 - Extract insights from large datasets to identify trends and opportunities.

 - Develop and implement data models and machine learning algorithms to enhance game performance and player experience.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally to integrate data-driven strategies into game development and decision-making.

 - Design and execute A/B tests to measure the impact of new features and optimizations.

 - Monitor and refine in-game metrics to maximize player satisfaction and retention.

 - Translate data into action, providing strategic recommendations to improve engagement and monetization.

BONUS POINT IF:

 - You’ve played Tasty Match: Cook and Puzzle and explored the game. If not, now’s a great time to start!

 - You’re curious about the gaming industry and eager to learn more.

 - You enjoy working in fast-moving, dynamic environments.

BENEFITS:

 - Be part of a top-tier team, learn from the best, and create games players love.

 - Competitive compensation. 

 - Health insurance with unlimited coverage. 

 - A beautiful, centrally located office in the heart of Istanbul.

 - Opportunities to attend global conferences and stay connected with the industry

source_jobs.title: 2D Game Animator
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a passionate and creative 2D Game Animator who will be producing high-quality 2D game animation for our chart-topping games. You will be responsible for creating all game and character animations utilising your imagination and visualisation skills. As a part of the Bigger team, you will be working closely with our game artists and game developers to architect outstanding gaming experiences that reach millions of players all around the world.
If you are a talented 2D Game Animator who loves games and shares our passion for enjoying and crafting games, come and join us!

ABOUT THIS ROLE:

 - Create high-quality 2D animations for characters, environments, UI, and visual effects.

 - Translate game concepts and storyboards into expressive animations that fit the Kitchen Masters' style.

 - Work with the art, product and development teams to ensure animations align with gameplay and technical requirements.

 - Optimize animations for mobile platforms while maintaining visual quality.

 - Contribute creative ideas for improving animation workflows and visual storytelling.

 - Ensure consistency and maintain the visual identity of the project.

YOU COULD BE A GREAT FIT IF:

 - Bachelor’s Degree in Animation, Graphics Design or relevant fields

 - Experience as a 2D Animator, preferably in the gaming industry.

 - Proficiency in animation software such as Spine, After Effects, Toon Boom, or equivalent.

 - Strong understanding of animation principles, timing, and motion dynamics.

 - Experience creating sprite sheets and implementing animations into Unity game engine.

 - Ability to collaborate effectively with multidisciplinary teams.

 - Strong knowledge of Particle System to be able to create high quality VFX.

 - 5+ years of industry experience is a plus

BONUS POINT IF:

 - You’ve played Tasty Match: Cook and Puzzle and explored the game. If not, now’s a great time to start!

 - You’re curious about the gaming industry and eager to learn more.

 - You enjoy working in fast-moving, dynamic environments.

BENEFITS:

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Performance Marketing
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Software Engineer to join our performance marketing team. As a Software Engineer, you’ll create and iterate playable ads.

In this role, you will build high-impact interactive experiences that reach millions of players worldwide through our marketing channels. You will work at the intersection of game development and performance marketing, rapidly experimenting, iterating, and bringing ideas to life.

If you are a passionate Software Engineer who enjoys building, testing, and scaling playable ads with real-time impact, come and join us!



ABOUT THIS ROLE:

 - Build high-quality playable ads to reach and engage millions of users

 - Have a strong understanding of AI tools to accelerate development

 - Design, implement, and iterate on core gameplay mechanics tailored for playable ads

 - Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Marketing Managers, and Artists to bring creative concepts to life

 - Optimize projects for performance, size, and cross-device compatibility

 - Rapidly prototype and test new ideas in a fast feedback loop environment

 - Own your projects end-to-end with a strong sense of responsibility and impact



YOU COULD BE A GREAT FIT IF:

 - Bachelor’s Degree in a related field

 - Experience developing with Unity (C#) and HTML5

 - Strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals

 - Understanding of performance optimization and lightweight development constraints

 - Experience with AI tools and technologies

 - Experience in developing playable ads is a big plus

 - Knowledge of software architecture design, OOP, and best practices in game development

 - Ability to work cross-functionally with marketing and creative teams

 - Good sense of gameplay experience and attention to detail

 - 3+ years of industry experience is a plus
   
   

BONUS POINT IF:

 - You’ve played Tasty Match: Cook and Puzzle and explored the game. If not, now’s a great time to start!

 - You’re curious about the gaming industry and eager to learn more.

 - You enjoy working in fast-moving, dynamic environments.
